info.name: API Security Testing – JSONPlaceholder
info.description:
Postman collection for API Security Risk Analysis assessment.
Future Interns – Cyber Security Internship, Task 3.
Target: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com
Tester: Harsh Aghera
Date: 17 July 2026

request.description: F-01: No authentication required. F-03: Response exposes name, email, address, geo-coordinates, phone, company details for all users.
F-01: No authentication required. Returns 100 fictional post records.

item.name: GET /Comments – List All Comments (case-insensitive routing test)

request.description: F-07: Uppercase 'C' used to test case-insensitive routing. Returns HTTP 200. F-03: Response includes email addresses for each comment.
F-01: No authentication required. Returns 100 fictional album records.
F-01: No authentication required. Returns 5,000 fictional photo records (129.91 KB response).
F-01: No authentication required. Returns 200 fictional todo records.
F-06: Deliberate error test. Expected: HTTP 404. Verify: no stack trace, no internal paths, response body is minimal (expected: {}).
F-06: Deliberate error test for non-existent resource. Expected: HTTP 404. Verify: no internal error details, body is minimal (expected: {}).
